item.title: Database Maintenance
item.description:
Jun 23, 14:00 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 23, 12:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 19, 18:51 UTC
Scheduled - We will be undergoing scheduled maintenance at this time. All systems will still be operational during this maintenance.

item.title: API Maintenance
item.description:
Jun 16, 18:49 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 16, 12:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 12, 18:20 UTC
Scheduled - We will be doing some infrastructure maintenance and monitoring the change afterwards. No impact is expected.

item.title: Realtime Networking Maintenance (USW)
item.description:
Jun 12, 09:35 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 12, 08:35 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 12, 08:31 UTC
Scheduled - We will be performing maintenance to specific realtime networking servers during this time. Expect one disconnect at most in instances on the affected region during the maintenance window.

item.title: API Errors
item.description:
Jun 11, 22:46 UTC
Resolved - This incident has been resolved.

Jun 11, 21:32 UTC
Monitoring - We've stabilized our systems and are seeing things recover. Will continue monitoring

Jun 11, 20:56 UTC
Identified - We've identified the issue and are working to fix it

Jun 11, 20:47 UTC
Investigating - We're seeing an increase in latency and errors from our API, currently investigating

item.title: API Issues
item.description:
Jun 8, 15:26 UTC
Resolved - The underlying issue has been resolved and all systems are operational as normal.

Jun 8, 03:45 UTC
Monitoring - Our mitigations are working and we've seeing latency and errors recover, we'll continue monitoring to ensure things remain stable.

Jun 8, 03:24 UTC
Identified - We've identified the issue as a hardware failure and are working to mitigate it

Jun 8, 03:14 UTC
Investigating - We're seeing increased latency and errors with our API

item.title: API Outage
item.description:

May 25, 02:09 UTC
Monitoring - We're seeing our systems recover and are monitoring to ensure they remain stable

May 25, 00:59 UTC
Investigating - We're currently investigating an increase in errors and latency with our API

item.title: Realtime Networking Maintenance (EU)
item.description:
May 7, 16:00 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 7, 15:30 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 7, 15:18 UTC
Scheduled - We will be performing maintenance across our realtime networking servers during this time. This may result in a short period where users are unable to join or create instances in this region, it should not result in any disconnects.

item.title: API Outage
item.description:
Mar 16, 02:12 UTC
Resolved - This incident has been resolved.

Mar 16, 01:01 UTC
Update - We are continuing to monitor for any further issues.

Mar 16, 01:00 UTC
Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and VRChat services are back online. We are monitoring as users log in.

Mar 15, 23:39 UTC
Update - The core issue causing the outage has been identified and we are working to resolve it.

Mar 15, 21:26 UTC
Update - We have identified the issue and are working with providers to resolve our outage as quickly as possible.

Mar 15, 21:03 UTC
Update - We are continuing to investigate the issues causing the ongoing outage. There is currently no estimate of time to fix.

Mar 15, 19:19 UTC
Identified - We're currently seeing high amounts of latency and errors in our API systems

item.title: API Maintenance
item.description:
Feb 26, 19:42 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Feb 26, 14:30 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Feb 26, 14:16 UTC
Scheduled - There will be maintenance occurring the API, this to resolve the issues observed during peak hours over this past weekend.

Impact shouldn't be too bad and only take a portion of the time noted but might result in slow updates in the social menu and other related systems.
